bundleCheck.conclusion: PR code IS deployed. New BEM structure (.lists, .lists__items, .wishlist-card) is live. Old md:space-y-2.5 is gone.

token1_accountShell_paddingBottom.prNote: PR #2292 does not modify account-shell.vue, vc-container.vue, or any layout wrapper. The pb-9 source is vc-container component default: .vc-container { --pb: var(--vc-container-pb, 2.25rem); } — 2.25rem = 36px. The account-shell element has no override of --vc-container-pb.
token1_accountShell_paddingBottom.result: FAIL — 36px is off-grid (nearest: 32 or 40). Source is outside PR scope. PR does NOT fix this token.

token2_linkListsWrapper_paddingLeft.prNote: PR #2292 does not modify link-lists.vue. The pl-2.5 source is the compiled SCSS rule: .link-lists__wrapper { padding: 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.625rem; } — 0.625rem = 10px.
token2_linkListsWrapper_paddingLeft.result: FAIL — 10px is off-grid (nearest: 8 or 12). Source is outside PR scope. PR does NOT fix this token.

token3_listsItems_gap.prNote: PR removed the old div with class 'space-y-3 md:space-y-2.5'. The new .lists__items uses @apply space-y-3 (12px) as default, but adds @container (min-width: 36rem) { @apply grid ... gap-y-2.5 space-y-0; }. At viewport 1280px the .lists__container is 941px wide, which exceeds 36rem (576px), so the container query IS active and row-gap: 0.625rem (10px) applies.
token3_listsItems_gap.rowGap_768_estimate: 10px (container still > 36rem at 768px viewport, as the content area minus sidebar is > 576px)
token3_listsItems_gap.result: FAIL — Old md:space-y-2.5 (10px) was replaced by @container gap-y-2.5 (also 10px). The value changed from a viewport media query to a container query, but the numeric result is identical: still 10px, still off-grid. Structurally equivalent violation.

additional_finding_outside_ticket_scope.result: FAIL — 6px is off-grid (nearest: 4 or 8). Introduced by PR #2292 in wishlist-card.vue. Outside VCST-5111 ticket scope but part of same PR diff. Note for dev: change gap-1.5 to gap-1 (4px) or gap-2 (8px).

verdict_rationale: PR #2292 is confirmed deployed (build hash bcfcf0cc matches, new BEM structure is live). Token 1 (account-shell paddingBottom 36px) and Token 2 (link-lists__wrapper paddingLeft 10px) are NOT addressed by this PR — their source files (vc-container, link-lists.vue) are untouched. Token 3 (lists__items gap 10px) was refactored from md:space-y-2.5 to @container gap-y-2.5 but the computed value is still 10px — the off-grid violation persists. All three ticket tokens remain FAIL on build bcfcf0cc.
